title: Map Marker Fix - v1.0.8
summary: New installable build (runtime 1.0.8) with correctly sized map markers on Android - hospital pins, provider pins, and the ambulance now render at their intended size on installed builds. Includes the full request-to-visit lifecycle continuity fixes.

changes.message: Map markers render at the correct size on Android installed builds - hospital pins, provider pins, and the live ambulance are no longer oversized.
Confirm arrival and complete visits reliably - the full emergency lifecycle syncs from dispatch through completion and rating.
Scheduled visits: live lifecycle card, cancel confirmation, and recovery notices on the map visit detail.
Cleaner transport selection footer, realtime tracking hardening, and a version marker at the bottom of Settings.
